app_tagline: Track zakat with a calm, mobile-first account shell.
app_intro: The first slice now ships the public landing page, separate auth routes, and the protected app shell.
landing_card_body: Create a password-based account, sign in, and then move into the protected app shell.
shell_note: The protected shell uses a responsive sidebar on desktop and a bottom tab bar on mobile.
sign_in_description: Use your email and password to enter the protected app shell.
sign_up_description: Set up a password-based account to access zakat tracking features.
auth_error_invalid: Please check your input and try again.
app_overview_body: This slice proves the authenticated navigation and account boundary. Profile and reminder work comes next.
history_page_note: This protected tab is ready for cycle review in the next slice.
settings_page_note: Profile switching, reminders, and auth settings will land here in the next slices.
